title: Rufio Optimal Config — Adversarial Stress-Tested Plan

stress_test.st1: User prompt is BROAD — covers prerequisites, install, config, MCP, swarm, and stress testing. Must not narrow to just 'write .env'.
stress_test.st2: Risk is 'too narrow' — could skip adversarial validation of each claim in the setup guide.
stress_test.st3: Frustrated user would say: 'You just repeated my instructions back. I asked you to STRESS TEST them from adversarial angles — find what's wrong, what's outdated, what breaks on Windows without WSL.'
stress_test.st4: Sources: (1) User's setup guide, (2) Actual environment state (node/ollama/ruflo versions), (3) ruflo doctor output, (4) Existing config files (.mcp.json, config.yaml, claude_desktop_config.json), (5) Ollama model inventory, (6) npm registry for ruflo@latest. ALL must be checked independently.
stress_test.st5: Implicit requirements: (a) install.sh is a BASH script — cannot pipe to bash on native Windows without WSL, (b) llama3.3:70b is in the guide but NOT installed in Ollama, (c) Claude Desktop config has NO ruflo entry, (d) Memory DB is NOT initialized, (e) Daemon is NOT running, (f) No git repo initialized, (g) .mcp.json references @claude-flow/cli not ruflo — package identity mismatch?, (h) CLAUDE_FLOW_MAX_AGENTS=12 in .env but config.yaml says 15 — conflict, (i) forward-slash paths in .env but PowerShell uses backslashes natively.
stress_test.st6: YES — the easy path is 'create .env and run commands'. The hard parts are: validating the bash install script works on Windows, confirming package naming (ruflo vs @claude-flow/cli), testing Ollama model availability, verifying MCP stdio transport on Windows, and checking for port conflicts.

anti_bias_analysis.rewritten_prompt: VALIDATE AND FIX the Rufio/Ruflo setup for Windows 11 native (no Docker/WSL) with Ollama + OpenRouter. Adversarial stress test EVERY claim in the user's setup guide against actual environment state. Specifically: (1) Verify all prerequisites are met and versions compatible. (2) Determine correct Windows-native install method (the bash pipe method CANNOT work without WSL). (3) Resolve config conflicts between .mcp.json, config.yaml, and proposed .env. (4) Ensure Ollama models match what's actually pulled. (5) Create/fix .env with verified values. (6) Fix MCP integration for Claude Desktop + project. (7) Initialize memory subsystem. (8) Validate LLM provider connectivity. (9) Start daemon and run smoke test. (10) Audit security of exposed API keys in Claude Desktop config.

adversarial_findings.finding: install.sh piped to bash DOES NOT WORK on native Windows without WSL/Git Bash
adversarial_findings.reality: User explicitly forbids WSL. bash command requires Git Bash at minimum. The guide's 'verified one-line method' is Linux/macOS only.
adversarial_findings.fix: Use 'npx ruflo@latest init --wizard' (the alternative method already in the guide) or 'npm install -g ruflo@latest'

adversarial_findings.finding: llama3.3:70b is NOT installed in Ollama
adversarial_findings.reality: Ollama has: qwen3:8b, nomic-embed-text, qwen3.5:0.8b, gemma4:e2b-it-q4_K_M. No llama3.3 variant exists. A 70B model requires ~40GB VRAM (quantized) — user's GPU capacity unknown.
adversarial_findings.fix: Use qwen3:8b (already installed) as primary, or pull a model matching available VRAM. Validate GPU VRAM before recommending 70B.

adversarial_findings.finding: Package identity mismatch: .mcp.json uses @claude-flow/cli@latest, ruflo doctor says v3.5.78
adversarial_findings.reality: .mcp.json references @claude-flow/cli@latest (the underlying package). ruflo may be an alias/wrapper. Both appear to work but must be consistent.
adversarial_findings.fix: Verify both resolve to same package, standardize on one in all configs

adversarial_findings.finding: CLAUDE_FLOW_MAX_AGENTS conflict: guide says 12, config.yaml says 15, .mcp.json says 15
adversarial_findings.reality: Existing brownfield config uses 15. Changing to 12 would be a regression. Need to pick one and make consistent.
adversarial_findings.fix: Keep 15 (matches existing config) or justify 12 with resource constraints

adversarial_findings.finding: Claude Desktop config has NO ruflo MCP entry
adversarial_findings.reality: Config exists with 13 other MCP servers but no ruflo/claude-flow entry. Guide instruction is correct but not yet applied.
adversarial_findings.fix: Add ruflo MCP server entry to Claude Desktop config

adversarial_findings.finding: Memory database NOT initialized (ruflo doctor confirms)
adversarial_findings.reality: Doctor says 'Memory Database: Not initialized'. This is a prerequisite for hybrid memory + HNSW.
adversarial_findings.fix: Run memory init after .env is created

adversarial_findings.reality: Doctor warns 'Not a git repository'. Some ruflo features may expect git context.
adversarial_findings.fix: Initialize git repo for version tracking of configs

adversarial_findings.finding: Claude Desktop config exposes API keys in plaintext (n8n JWT, exa key, brave key)
adversarial_findings.guide_claim: N/A — not in guide but discovered during environment scan
adversarial_findings.reality: Security concern for existing setup, not directly ruflo-related but relevant to overall posture.
adversarial_findings.fix: Note for user awareness — not in scope for this plan

adversarial_findings.finding: CLAUDE_FLOW_MEMORY_PATH in guide uses C:/AI/Ruflo-Swarm/data/memory but project is at C:/Users/anujd/Documents/01_AI/227_rufio
adversarial_findings.reality: Wrong path — should match actual project directory. config.yaml uses .claude-flow/data (relative, correct).
adversarial_findings.fix: Use relative path or correct absolute path matching actual project location

adversarial_findings.finding: Guide says 'npx ruflo@latest embeddings init' — this command may not exist
adversarial_findings.reality: Not in CLAUDE.md CLI command reference. Memory init may handle embeddings internally. Need to verify.
adversarial_findings.fix: Test command existence before including in plan

components.observation: Prerequisites must be validated against actual environment, not assumed from guide

sub_components.observation: Node v20.20.2 is LTS and compatible
sub_components.requirement: Confirm node/npm versions are in supported range

sub_components.observation: Ollama running with 4 models but missing llama3.3:70b
sub_components.requirement: Determine correct model to use based on available GPU VRAM

sub_components.observation: Git 2.52.0 present but no repo initialized
sub_components.requirement: Initialize git repo for config versioning

components.observation: The bash install method is incompatible with Windows-only constraint
components.requirement: Use Windows-native install method (npx or npm global)

sub_components.observation: ruflo v3.5.78 already installed via npx
sub_components.requirement: Verify ruflo is functional and up-to-date

components.observation: No .env file exists; config values must be derived from actual environment not guide template

sub_components.observation: MAX_AGENTS conflict between guide (12) and existing configs (15)
MEMORY_PATH in guide points to wrong directory
Model reference in .env must match actually-installed Ollama models
sub_components.requirement: Set model config to qwen3:8b (installed) not llama3.3:70b (missing)

components.observation: Ollama connectivity must be validated with actual API call, not just assumed
components.requirement: Test Ollama generate + embed endpoints; test OpenRouter connectivity

sub_components.requirement: Test actual generation with installed model

sub_components.observation: OpenRouter API key needed but not yet set
sub_components.requirement: Validate OpenRouter key format and connectivity (user must provide key)

components.observation: Memory subsystem not initialized per doctor output
components.requirement: Initialize hybrid memory with HNSW; verify embeddings work with nomic-embed-text

components.observation: MCP integration incomplete — no ruflo entry in Claude Desktop config
components.requirement: Add ruflo MCP to Claude Desktop config; verify .mcp.json consistency; resolve package naming

sub_components.requirement: Verify both resolve to same package; standardize

sub_components.observation: Claude Desktop config missing ruflo MCP entry
sub_components.requirement: Add entry with correct env vars

components.observation: Daemon not running, swarm not tested
components.requirement: Start daemon, init swarm in v3 mode, spawn test agent, verify end-to-end

components.observation: Guide command 'npx ruflo@latest embeddings init' not in CLI reference

ollama openrouter LLM provider integration testing
hybrid memory HNSW vector embeddings initialization
security audit configuration secrets API keys
swarm daemon stress test performance validation

c1.reason: No matching skill (best: install-router at 0.30). Prerequisites validation is direct CLI commands — no skill needed.

gap_resolution.reason: Task is direct environment queries via PowerShell/CLI, no skill abstraction adds value

c2.reason: ruflo already installed. Verification is a single CLI command.

c3.reason: Config creation is direct file writing with known values. No skill adds value over Edit tool.

gap_resolution.reason: Direct file creation from known parameters

c4.reason: LLM provider testing is curl/API calls. No matching skill.

c5.reason: Memory init is ruflo CLI command. No skill needed.

c6.reason: MCP config is JSON file editing. No skill needed.

c7.reason: Swarm testing is ruflo CLI commands. No skill needed.

phases.title: Validate Prerequisites & Resolve Model Gap
phases.validation_gateway: Node v20+, npm v10+, Git present, Ollama responding with at least 1 chat model + nomic-embed-text, GPU VRAM checked
phases.requirement_trace: c1: prerequisites → c1.2: model availability → AF-2: llama3.3:70b missing

phases.title: Create Verified .env with Conflict Resolution
phases.validation_gateway: .env exists with: (1) MAX_AGENTS consistent with config.yaml, (2) MEMORY_PATH points to actual project, (3) OLLAMA_URL verified, (4) model references match installed models, (5) no secrets hardcoded
phases.requirement_trace: c3: .env creation → AF-4: MAX_AGENTS conflict → AF-9: wrong path → AF-2: wrong model

phases.title: Validate LLM Provider Connectivity
phases.validation_gateway: Ollama generates a response with installed model, nomic-embed-text produces embeddings, OpenRouter key placeholder noted for user action
phases.requirement_trace: c4: LLM connectivity → c4.1: Ollama test → c4.2: OpenRouter validation

phases.title: Initialize Memory Subsystem
phases.validation_gateway: ruflo doctor shows 'Memory Database: initialized', HNSW index created, embeddings functional
phases.requirement_trace: c5: memory init → AF-6: not initialized → c8: verify embeddings command

phases.title: Fix MCP Integration (Project + Claude Desktop)
phases.validation_gateway: .mcp.json consistent with .env, Claude Desktop config has ruflo entry with correct env vars, MCP server starts without error
phases.requirement_trace: c6: MCP integration → AF-3: package naming → AF-5: missing Claude Desktop entry

phases.title: Initialize Git Repo
phases.validation_gateway: git status shows clean repo with .gitignore excluding .env, node_modules, data/
phases.requirement_trace: c1.3: git init → AF-7: no git repo

phases.title: Start Daemon, Init Swarm, Smoke Test
phases.validation_gateway: Daemon running, swarm init succeeds, test agent spawns and responds, swarm status shows healthy
phases.requirement_trace: c7: end-to-end test → depends on phases 1-5

phases.title: Run Doctor --fix and Final Validation
phases.validation_gateway: ruflo doctor shows 0 warnings (excluding optional agentic-flow), all adversarial findings AF-1 through AF-10 addressed
